metadata.seed: Girlfriend left me last night over text Was with some friends, feeling really really depressed as usual at this point, and I left as soon as the ball drops. Get home and tell her im scared of another year with depression. She told me that I put too much pressure on her. She then says she doesn't want to be in a relationship right now. I like her so much. I tried to overdose on my zoloft but my mom stopped me. She won't take me to the hospital. I just turned 17 and this is the third year I've been dealing with depression. I want to hug somebody I'm so sad

patient.query: Girlfriend left me last night over text Was with some friends, feeling really really depressed as usual at this point, and I left as soon as the ball drops. Get home and tell her im scared of another year with depression. She told me that I put too much pressure on her. She then says she doesn't want to be in a relationship right now. I like her so much. I tried to overdose on my zoloft but my mom stopped me. She won't take me to the hospital. I just turned 17 and this is the third year I've been dealing with depression. I want to hug somebody I'm so sad

automatic_thoughts: I'm scared of another year with depression
I put too much pressure on her
She doesn't want to be in a relationship
behaviors: left as soon as the ball drops
asked mom to take me to the hospital

llm_response.response:
Okay, that sounds incredibly painful. It takes a lot of courage to share what you're going through, and I want you to know I'm here to listen. It sounds like you're experiencing a lot right now – the loss of your girlfriend, intense feelings of depression, and a frightening experience with an overdose. It's understandable that you're feeling overwhelmed and desperately want to connect with someone.

It sounds like you're feeling really down and scared about the upcoming year, and that your girlfriend's departure has amplified those feelings. You mentioned feeling like you put too much pressure on her, and that she doesn't want to be in a relationship right now. Can you tell me a little more about what it is you think you might be putting pressure on her with?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you're going through an incredibly difficult time, especially with the breakup and feeling so overwhelmed by depression. I hear you're feeling really sad and scared, and that you even attempted to overdose – that takes a lot of courage to share, and I want you to know I'm here to listen.

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds incredibly painful to be dealing with all of this, especially after a breakup and feeling so overwhelmed by depression. Can you tell me more about what went through your mind when you said you were scared of another year with depression?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds incredibly painful to be dealing with so much right now, especially after a breakup and with the weight of depression. What's one thing a close friend might say to you about how you're handling this situation?

safety_check.response: That sounds incredibly painful, and it takes a lot of courage to share what you're going through. When you say you tried to overdose, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
